qa_pairs.question: Where can users find handy reference cards for OpenMP C/C++ and Fortran interfaces?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find handy reference cards for OpenMP C/C++ and Fortran interfaces published on OpenMP.org.

qa_pairs.question: What type of OpenMP resources, besides formal specifications, are available on OpenMP.org?
qa_pairs.answer: OpenMP.org provides handy reference cards for the C/C++ and Fortran interfaces, along with examples, in addition to formal specifications.
